infra-01.title: VM: Knowledge API — runtime 讀 JSON 取代 build-time 打包
infra-01.summary: Claude 設計架構 → Codex 實作。在 VM agent-bridge-standalone/server.mjs 加 Knowledge API (GET /api/knowledge/*) runtime 讀 JSON，前端改打 VM。改 JSON 立刻生效不用 redeploy。涉及 11 個 import 點。
infra-01.dispatchPrompt: [AFTER claude architecture brief approved] Build Knowledge API on VM agent-bridge-standalone/server.mjs. Add routes: GET /api/knowledge/profiles, /themes, /supply-chain, /stock-meta, /analysis-frameworks. Runtime read JSON files from ~/app/src/data/ and ~/app/src/lib/knowledge-base/.

infra-02.title: VM: HTTPS + Auth token
infra-02.summary: VM HTTP only + 無 auth。需要 Nginx 反向代理 + Let's Encrypt SSL + BRIDGE_AUTH_TOKEN。
infra-02.dispatchPrompt: Set up HTTPS and auth on GCP VM (35.236.155.62). Nginx reverse proxy + Let's Encrypt + BRIDGE_AUTH_TOKEN. Block unauthenticated writes to Agent Bridge.

infra-03.title: VM: 安裝 LLM CLIs (Codex/Qwen/Gemini)
infra-03.summary: VM 上裝 Codex CLI, Qwen CLI, Gemini CLI + API keys。讓 Agent Bridge 可以 dispatch。
infra-03.dispatchPrompt: Install Codex CLI, Qwen CLI, Gemini CLI on GCP VM (35.236.155.62). Configure API keys in secure env vars. Verify Agent Bridge can spawn each CLI end-to-end.

infra-04.title: 前端 11 個 static import 改打 VM Knowledge API
infra-04.summary: stockClassifier.js(3), coverageAdapter.js(3), knowledgeBase.js(7), knowledgeEvolutionRuntime.js, brainRuntime.js 共 11 個 static JSON import 改成 fetch VM API。
infra-04.dispatchPrompt: Refactor 11 static JSON imports to fetch from VM Knowledge API. Files: stockClassifier.js, coverageAdapter.js, knowledgeBase.js, knowledgeEvolutionRuntime.js, brainRuntime.js. Add error fallback to local snapshot.

p0-01.title: P0: 修 stale enrichment invalidation
p0-01.summary: usePortfolioDerivedData enriched dossiers 可能 stale → UI 顯示錯誤。加 invalidation + regression test。
p0-01.dispatchPrompt: Fix stale enrichment invalidation in usePortfolioDerivedData.js. Add invalidation mechanism + regression test.

p0-02.title: P0: 移除 lifecycle sync 的 tab-gating
p0-02.summary: useEventLifecycleSync 不該受 tab 影響。lifecycle sync 應在 portfolio-ready 就跑。
p0-02.dispatchPrompt: Remove tab-based gating from useEventLifecycleSync.js. Sync should run when portfolio-ready regardless of active tab.

p0-03.title: P0: Events filter type regression test
p0-03.summary: normalizeEventRecord 新增 type discriminator 可能 break EventsPanel filter。需 e2e regression test。
p0-03.dispatchPrompt: Write e2e regression test: normalizeEventRecord → EventsPanel filter → filterEventsByType() with legacy filter buckets.

p0-04.title: P0: null date guard in useEventLifecycleSync
p0-04.summary: parseSlashDate 可能回傳 null 導致 crash。加 null guard + unit test。
p0-04.dispatchPrompt: Add null-date guard to useEventLifecycleSync. Unit test forcing null return + verify graceful no-op.

feat-01.title: 接通 cron target-price 到前端 (7/30 天規則)
feat-01.summary: 2026-04-15 Qwen 驗證 complete — cron + fetch + 7/30 freshness + UI badge + aging warn 均到位。見 .tmp/dispatch-logs/feat-01-qwen.log。

feat-02.title: News vs Events UI 完全分離
feat-02.summary: 加 type discriminator，渲染 split by type。news = 純資訊，event = 預測+復盤。改 NewsPanel + EventsPanel。
feat-02.dispatchPrompt: Implement news vs events UI separation. type:'news'|'event' discriminator, split rendering, news=info style, event=prediction+review. Update NewsPanel + EventsPanel.

feat-03.title: 權證→標的股 UI + 目標價連動
feat-03.summary: UI 顯示（標的：台積電），用 targets[underlyingCode] 的報告。加負測試。
feat-03.dispatchPrompt: Implement warrant→underlying UI. Show underlying name, use underlying targets. Add negative-path tests.

feat-04.title: Target freshness 7/30 天 + noise 評估
feat-04.summary: computeFreshnessGrade 30/90/120 → 7/30。先 snapshot 再改，避免 UI 爆量警告。
feat-04.dispatchPrompt: Change target freshness thresholds 30/90/120 → 7/30 in dateUtils.js. Snapshot before/after to assess UI noise.

feat-05.title: 全組合研究行為驗證 — 權證策略框架
feat-05.summary: 跑一次 /api/research portfolio mode，確認權證真的用 Delta/Theta/IV。
feat-05.dispatchPrompt: Trigger full portfolio research. Verify warrant sections use Delta/Theta/IV framework.

feat-06.title: Auto-classifier 增量重分類 + 低信心 badge
feat-06.summary: classifier 改 incremental（只重算 stale/unknown）。低信心用 badge 標示。配合 Knowledge API。
feat-06.dispatchPrompt: Implement incremental reclassification in stockClassifier.js. Add UI badges for low-confidence labels.

test-01.title: 補齊權證 enrichment 負測試
test-01.dispatchPrompt: Write negative-path tests for warrant enrichment in dossierUtils.js.

test-02.title: 補齊 freshness 邊界測試 (7/30 天)
test-02.dispatchPrompt: Write boundary tests for computeFreshnessGrade at 7/30 day thresholds.

test-03.title: 補齊 multi-stock event inference 測試
test-03.summary: autoReviewEvent 沒驗 entry/exit code overlap。加 basket event tests。
test-03.dispatchPrompt: Write tests for autoReviewEvent basket events. Validate entry/exit code overlap.

feat-07.title: Dashboard 視覺改《去他的世界末日》風格
